response.justification: Candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer with broad experience across JS/TS, Node.js, and DLang, plus some past C/C++ IDE work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI). However, the role demands deep Java, Kotlin, Spring, and JVM expertise, which the resume only mentions in passing (Java alongside DLang on robotics work) with no evidence of Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, Kotlin, or JVM internals experience. The IDE-tooling alignment is too narrow and dated to offset the missing JVM ecosystem depth.
strengths: Prior IDE development experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Proven track record on complex, large-scale and low-latency systems
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus experience
Minimal and dated Java exposure; no Kotlin experience listed
No evidence of deep JVM internals or language-tooling work

key_factors.factor: Primary stack is JS/TS and DLang, not JVM
